gist.headline: The hive can see
gist.blurb: The greenhouse just got a new pair of eyes. AI Vision is a fresh community app that lets you analyze images using multiple models.
gist.summary: Added the 'AI Vision' app by UniverseKing4 to the community showcase.
gist.impact: Users can discover a new community-built tool for multi-model image analysis in the apps directory.
gist.visual_concept: The PR adds an image analysis app. Key symbols: magnifying glass, photographs, eyes. Characters: Polly the bee and the Monitor Robot (who loves seeing things). Scene: Polly and the Robot examining a pixelated photograph together.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot and a chunky robot with a CRT monitor head looking closely at a glowing photograph through a tiny magnifying glass. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic, soft pastel gradients, retro gaming vibes.
